title: Run Status
description: Single source of truth for run state. Records current step, timestamps, retry counts, and final outcome.

current-step.description: Name of the current or last-completed step (agent name)

outcome.description: Final or current outcome of the run

review-fix-loop-count.description: Number of reviewer→implementor cycles (review-reject-fix). Increment when reviewer rejects and we hand back to implementor.

created-at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run was created

updated-at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the status was last updated

step-timestamps.description: Timestamps per step (e.g. planner.started, planner.completed, implementor.started)

retry-counts.description: Retry count per step when a step was retried (e.g. implementor: 2)

failure-reason.description: Reason for failure or cancellation, if outcome is failed or canceled

branch.description: Branch name for this run (e.g. swarm/add-user-auth)

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the worktree directory when branching enabled

prUrl.description: URL of the PR created when run completes successfully

warnings.description: Non-fatal orchestration or publish issues recorded during the run

tool.description: CLI or integration involved, if any

outputExcerpt.description: Short stderr/stdout excerpt relevant to the warning

plan-replan-count.description: Number of times the manager rejected the plan and requested replanning

decompositionApplied.description: True when plan-decomposer split the plan into multiple sub-plans

subPlanIndex.description: Current sub-plan index (1-based) when iterating over decomposed sub-plans

subPlanTotal.description: Total number of sub-plans when plan was decomposed

resumeSubPlanIndex.description: Next sub-plan index to resume from after a paused review checkpoint or halted decomposition run

subplansManifestPath.description: Path to subplans.manifest.json when decomposition was applied

priorSubPlanSummaries.description: Array of { index, scopeLabel, summary } for completed sub-plans
